name: Orora Limited
analysis: ORA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 41% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.4050, stop A$1.3019, target A$1.9850 (5.62:1) — then trail it.
